avoidSaying: before regular publish / before each publish
sentencePatterns: We need to [do something] before every release.
... must be in place before every release.
realLifeExamples: We have to put code verification in place before every release.
Before each release, the team runs a full regression test.
productionPrompts: 用 before every release 造一句关于发布前检查或流程的句子。
